message:
feat(tui): add frame-time benchmarks + conformal coverage validation (br-2zq8o)

D.3: Criterion benchmarks for Bayesian diff strategy (frame_bench.rs):
stable, mixed, baseline, and 1000-frame throughput scenarios.

4 new tests: bayesian_not_slower_than_full, incremental_faster_on_stable,
conformal_coverage_90pct (distribution-free validation), and
golden_strategy_decisions_match (determinism proof).

Also commits the Bayesian TUI diff strategy (tui_decision.rs) from D.1/D.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+[[bench]]

+harness = false
